title: Pan-Seared Ukrainian Dumplings with Sesame Seeds
description: A traditional Ukrainian dish featuring pan-seared dumplings topped with sesame seeds for added crunch and flavor.
instructions: Heat butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add Ukrainian dumplings to the skillet and cook for about 3-4 minutes per side, or until golden brown.
Sprinkle sesame seeds over the top of the dumplings and cook for an additional minute.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
